class.name: PlayFabGroups
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.groups[/code]. This generated service wraps client-safe PlayFab entity group membership, role, invitation, application, and block APIs from the GDK PlayFab Services SDK. Methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser], accept an optional request [Dictionary] using snake_case PlayFab field names, and return a completion [Signal] that emits [PlayFabResult]. Result payloads are converted to Godot Dictionaries and Arrays.

method.name: accept_group_application_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsAcceptGroupApplication[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: accept_group_invitation_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsAcceptGroupInvitation[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: add_members_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsAddMembers[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: apply_to_group_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsApplyToGroup[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: block_entity_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsBlockEntity[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: change_member_role_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsChangeMemberRole[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: create_group_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsCreateGroup[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: create_role_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsCreateRole[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: delete_group_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsDeleteGroup[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: delete_role_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsDeleteRole[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: get_group_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsGetGroup[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: invite_to_group_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsInviteToGroup[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: is_member_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsIsMember[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_group_applications_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsListGroupApplications[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_group_blocks_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsListGroupBlocks[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_group_invitations_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsListGroupInvitations[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_group_members_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsListGroupMembers[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_membership_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsListMembership[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: list_membership_opportunities_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsListMembershipOpportunities[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: remove_group_application_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsRemoveGroupApplication[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: remove_group_invitation_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsRemoveGroupInvitation[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: remove_members_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsRemoveMembers[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: unblock_entity_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsUnblockEntity[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is null on success.

method.name: update_group_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsUpdateGroup[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.

method.name: update_role_async
method.description: Starts [code]PFGroupsUpdateRole[/code] for [param user]. The completed result data is a Dictionary returned by the PlayFab SDK.
